rootCause: The welcome/connect-github quest used a long parenthetical sentence in the steps node, causing inline scope labels to wrap awkwardly and appear isolated with line breaks around `gist` and `repo` in the chat bubble.
resolution: Rewrote the steps copy to keep scope guidance concise and inline (\`gist\` for cloud sync and \`repo\` for submissions) so the labels render naturally in-flow.
